GreenRoaches.name: Green Roaches (Enhancing)
GreenRoaches.desc: Enhances the Emperor with buffs. Gain 1 Binding Vow for every 50 Green Roaches (Max 120).

EnragedGreenRoaches.name: Green Roaches (Enraged)
EnragedGreenRoaches.desc: Gain 1 Burn/Bleed/Bind every 12~15 stacks, 1 Clash Power Down every 20 stacks, and 1 Plus Coin Drop every 30 stacks (Max 120)
EnragedGreenRoaches.flavor: These Roaches are starved and hungry for food.

SukunaPlotArmor.name: Binding Vow (Green Emperor)
SukunaPlotArmor.desc: Gain 1 Restriction and 1 Damage Up every 2 Binding Vows; gain 1 Near-light Superbattery every 3 Binding Vows (Max 6)

Restriction.name: Restriction
Restriction.desc: Gain 1 Defense Level Down for every 2 Restriction; gain 1 Fragile for every 6 Restriction (Max 30)
